The '''Esselian Empire''' was a government based on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], a [[Core Founder/Legends|Core Founder]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], that once contained nineteen [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The empire collapsed following the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] after it failed to meet certain financial obligations.<ref name="CatCW" />
